heading: Determination of applicability
label: 5103 Determination of applicability
text: The Office of Personnel Management shall determine finally the applicability of to specific positions and employees, except for positions and employees in the Office of the Architect of the Capitol.section 5102 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 1083, .Oct. 28, 1949, ch. 782, § 20363 Stat. 956 .5 U.S.C. 1084(c), .Oct. 28, 1949, ch. 782, § 204(c)63 Stat. 957, .Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1208, § 105(b)68 Stat. 1106Former sections 1083 and 1084(c) are combined and restated for clarity. The words “hereinafter referred to as the Commission” in former section 1083 are omitted as unnecessary. The exception from “section 1082 (except paragraph (7) thereof)” in former section 1084(c) is carried into section 5102(d).Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
Amendments1978— substituted “Office of Personnel Management” for “Civil Service Commission”.Pub. L. 95–454
Effective Date of 1978 AmendmentAmendment by effective 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 95–454section 907 of Pub. L. 95–454section 1101 of this titleOct. 13, 1978
